objective: Classify PGA Tour courses into structural style archetypes using scoring environment, skill component distributions, and volatility metrics. Archetypes capture HOW a course plays, not just how hard it is.
expected_archetypes: BIRDIE_FACTORY: high birdie rate, high scoring, low bogey
GRIND: low birdie, high bogey, low variance
DRIVER_ADVANTAGE: high driving dist premium, low driving acc
PRECISION: driving accuracy premium, low GIR
SCRAMBLE: low GIR, high scrambling value
PUTTING_CONTEST: high GIR, putting separates players
